headline: Peas 10 days out — 89°F heat will toughen pods fast
weather_notes: Pick from c2–c4 peas before Tuesday — 86–89°F Memorial Day weekend toughens pods fast with harvest only 10 days away.
Water peach, blackberry, and potato_bags Monday — all three are under a week old; Memorial Day's 89°F hits 2 days after their last drink.
Check the peach for wilt today and tomorrow — logged as struggling yesterday; 86–89°F on a day-1 transplant warrants shade cloth if leaves droop.

surfaced_tasks.title: Install trellis in c1 bean bed
surfaced_tasks.reason: Overdue two days — Good Mother Stollard is at day 21 and actively reaching for support; 89°F Memorial Day weekend will surge vine growth before untethered vines can be cleanly redirected.

suggested_tasks.title: Harvest peas before heat toughens pods
suggested_tasks.description: Pods were forming heavily in c2–c4 as of May 12 — 86–89°F Memorial Day weekend will toughen unpicked pods fast; c4 (Lillian's) had the most and should be checked first.
